summary: Service pages redesign testing complete. All 6 service pages successfully match homepage design system with identical navbar, hero style, typography, card styles, color scheme, and footer.
passed_tests: Navbar identical on service pages: logo, 4 nav links (Palvelut, Meistä, Referenssit, Yhteystiedot), 'Pyydä tarjous' CTA button
Hero section matches homepage style: gradient overlay (.hero-overlay), left-aligned text, background image
Breadcrumbs navigation present on service pages (Etusivu > Palvelut > Service Title)
Trust badges section with 4 badges: Vuodesta 2018, Ammattitaitoinen työ, Kotitalousvähennys, Tyytyväisyystakuu
'PALVELUN KUVAUS' description section with two-column layout verified
'PALVELUN SISÄLTÖ' / 'Mitä palvelu sisältää' features grid verified
'MIKSI MEIDÄT' section with checklist items (6 items with CheckCircle icons)
'TYÖVAIHEET' / 'Näin projekti etenee' process steps section with 4 numbered steps
'TOIMIALUE' / 'Palvelualueet' section with service area tags (Helsinki, Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen, Uusimaa)
Contact info box in service areas section with address, phone numbers, email
CTA section with contact form ('OTA YHTEYTTÄ') - 5 form inputs and submit button
'MUUT PALVELUT' related services section with 3 service cards
Footer matches homepage: logo, tagline, 5 nav links including Admin, copyright
Navigation from service page back to homepage via logo click works
/tasoitustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Tasoitustyöt Helsingissä'
/maalaustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Maalaustyöt Helsingissä'
/mikrosementti-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Mikrosementti Helsingissä'
/julkisivurappaus-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Julkisivurappaus Helsingissä'
/kattomaalaus-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Kattojen Maalaukset Helsingissä'
/julkisivumaalaus-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Julkisivujen Maalaukset Helsingissä'

design_verification.navbar_consistency: Identical structure between homepage and service pages - logo, nav links, CTA button
design_verification.hero_style: Same gradient overlay, left-aligned content, background image pattern
design_verification.typography: Same font family, sizes, and color scheme (teal primary, dark text, gray secondary)
design_verification.button_styles: Same btn-primary (teal) and btn-secondary (white with border) styles
design_verification.card_styles: Same service-card styling with hover effects
design_verification.footer: Identical footer with logo, tagline, nav links, Admin link, copyright
design_verification.color_scheme: Consistent teal (#0056D2 based) primary color throughout

context_for_next_testing_agent: Service pages redesign verified complete. All 6 Finnish SEO-friendly URLs working with consistent design matching homepage. Key sections verified: navbar, hero with gradient overlay, trust badges (4), description section, features grid, 'why choose us' checklist, process steps (4), service areas with contact info, CTA form, related services (3), and footer.
